title: ReviewData
description:
`review` (`--approve` / `--reject` a proposal). Approve is a compare-and-set on the base; a stale
base returns `CONFLICT`. **INFERRED.**

current_generation.description: The pointer's new generation when an approval moved `current`.

Generation.description:
The internal anti-replay counter `(epoch, seq)`. NEVER rendered to a user; the
agent consumes `expected`/`current` on a CONFLICT.

ReviewDecision.description:
A review verdict — `approve` promotes, `reject` carries a reason back, `withdraw` is the author
retracting their own open proposal. **INFERRED.**
